attributes.description: Overview of Falcon Identity Protection timeline events.

params.markdown:
## Identity Protection timeline overview

This dashboard is the primary overview for Falcon Identity Protection timeline activity from the `crowdstrike.identity_protection_timeline` data stream. Use it to monitor event volume, severity, and event mix across authentication, service access, LDAP activity, and privilege escalation.

Summary metrics and time-series panels help you spot spikes in failed authentications, important-severity events, and privilege escalation. Breakdowns by event type, data source, authentication outcome, user, host, and source IP show where identity-related activity is concentrated. The events table lists recent timeline events for investigation.

embeddableConfig.description: NEUTRAL(21) vs MODERATE(47) vs IMPORTANT(73) mix
